description: Redacted narrative chronicle contracts, derived from vault history but prepared for controlled exposure and analysis.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: Explicit narratives are permitted but must be redacted and traced back to vault sources.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All chronicles and timelines must use dedicated redacted schemas.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: Chronicles must include origin references into Black-Archivum and Atrocity-Seeds via IDs.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: Only redactedChronicle-style objectKinds should route here from the spine.

authoringHints.summary: Use this repo to produce controlled, redacted narrative artifacts suitable for internal review and limited sharing.
aiBehavior: Do not generate primary contracts here; only redacted views of existing vault content.
Always track provenance back to regionContractCard and seedContractCard IDs.
Expect additional governance review before any content in this repo is surfaced externally.
